name: Evisort AI Contract Intelligence API
what_it_does: Evisort (Workday) REST API for AI-powered contract intelligence and contract lifecycle management (CLM). Enables AI agents to ingest and analyze contracts with AI extraction, search contract repositories by clause or obligation, track contract milestones and renewal dates, extract structured data from unstructured contracts, manage contract workflows, and integrate contract insights with ERP and procurement systems.
use_cases: Ingesting and AI-analyzing contracts for obligation extraction from legal operations agents
Searching contract repositories by clause type or party name from contract intelligence agents
Tracking contract renewal dates and triggering alerts from contract management agents
Extracting structured metadata from unstructured contract documents from procurement agents
not_for: Contract authoring and redlining without AI analysis focus
Simple document storage without contract intelligence requirements
Consumer contract management without enterprise procurement workflows
best_when: A legal, procurement, or finance team wants AI agents to analyze existing contract portfolios, extract key terms and obligations, track renewal dates, and surface contract insights across the organization.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract obligation data affects legal and financial commitments. AI extraction may miss nuances — always have legal review of critical contract terms.

auth.notes: Evisort (acquired by Workday 2023) uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Workday integration available for HCM/Finance customers. Separate service credentials for API integration. Enterprise deployment required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise CLM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing based on contract volume and users; Workday-acquired 2023
pricing.notes: Acquired by Workday in 2023. AI-native CLM with NLP extraction capabilities. Strong integration with Workday Finance and Procurement. Competing with Ironclad, Icertis, and DocuSign CLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; async processing for large contract batches

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract obligations are legally binding — validate AI extractions before relying on them
No public MCP server — REST API with Workday OAuth2
AI extraction accuracy varies by contract type and complexity — implement confidence thresholds
Large contract ingestion is async — implement webhook or polling for completion
Workday acquisition may affect API roadmap — verify current product direction
Enterprise deployment required — not available as self-service SaaS for API-only access
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract legal and financial obligation data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Workday OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Legal review required for AI-extracted terms.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contract legal and financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Workday OAuth2. Multi-region data residency.
